description.unified: Heals the ally with the lowest current HP and nearby allies for ??? HP, deals ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies, and reduces their ATK Spd by 25% for 10 sec.
Deals ??? M.DMG to an enemy, knocks them back, [roots them->shackles them] for 6 sec, and increases M.DMG taken by 25% for 6 sec.
Grants all allies Invincibility for 7 sec and restores HP by ??? every 1 sec.
On hit, has a 20% chance to deal ??? M.DMG to the target and stun them for [1.5 sec->0.9 sec].

light.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100% [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the number of targets is increased by [2->3].

light.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1000 [(removed) Invincibility duration is increased by 1.5 sec].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->3000] and Invincibility duration is reduced by 3 sec, but all allies’ Attack is increased by 50% for 10 sec and cooldown is reduced by [(added) 15 sec].
Maximum Attack increase stacks are increased by 5 [(removed) Attack range is boosted by 20%].

description.unified: [Spear of Light] Gains Immunity to CC for the skill's duration and increases M.Weakness of the target by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Holy Sanctuary] Increases ATK by 25% and recovers {0} Mana every sec for the duration of Skill.
Increases own Skill activation speed, and each time a skill is used, increases all allies' ATK by {0}% and [DEF->M.DEF] by {1}%. This effect stacks up to 7 times.
Summons the soul of God’s Book, Genesis for 10sec, increasing the number of targets of Normal Attacks to 2. Every 2sec, heals all allies for ??? and dispels negative effects.

1.from: Changes Skill Activation requirements of Soul Weapon to 4.
1.to: Changes Skill Activation Requirements of the Soul Weapon to 4.
1.unified: Changes Skill Activation Requirements of the Soul Weapon to 4.
